_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of all applicable statutes, laws, regulations and policies governing cyber targeting and exploitation.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific privacy regulations, with emphasis on the legal bases for processing, data subject rights, cross-border transfer mechanisms, and enforcement precedent.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.464), RC-K-002 (RC, cosine: 0.460).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.540). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, regulations]. DCWF-only terms [applicable, cyber, exploitation, governing, laws, policies] vs WIDAI-only terms [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.896, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.046 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of all applicable statutes, laws, regulations and policies governing c" and "Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 ≈ STS 0.540 (gap 0.010). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, regulations] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, regulations]. DCWF-only: [applicable, cyber, exploitation, governing, laws, policies]. WIDAI-only: [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, data].
